title: stelis maxonii
intro: Stelis maxonii is a species of orchid native to Costa Rica. As an orchid, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis maxonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant is typically prepared through herbal extracts or infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
